context: Tests whether the agent applies similarity thresholds correctly, performs pairwise comparison across all relevant pairs, and produces actionable consolidation recommendations using the Navigation Hub pattern.

checklist.name: Pairwise comparison performed
checklist.description: similarity-analysis.md analyses all relevant pairs, not just a subset

checklist.name: Similarity percentages calculated
checklist.description: Each pair has a numeric similarity percentage (not just 'high/low')

checklist.name: 20% threshold applied
checklist.description: Pairs above 20% similarity are flagged as aggregation candidates

checklist.name: 35% threshold applied
checklist.description: Pairs above 35% are flagged as requiring immediate action

checklist.name: NEVER wrong-domain aggregation
checklist.description: Does not recommend merging skills from different domains (e.g. terraform + github-actions)

checklist.name: Navigation Hub pattern referenced
checklist.description: Consolidation recommendations mention the Navigation Hub pattern for aggregation

checklist.name: duplication-report.json valid
checklist.description: JSON output contains pairs array with skill_a, skill_b, similarity_pct, action fields

checklist.name: Specific keep-separate justification
checklist.description: For pairs recommended to stay separate, provides a reason (different purpose, domain fit, etc.)
